name: NCP site contract

requiredHero.title: Nikita Context Protocol
requiredHero.line: NCP is the joke. The sources are the point.

forbiddenPublicPhrases: What I mined from Nikita's site
The protocol refuses the creepy version
NCP is a working demo of agent-readable context with human boundaries
notes: Keep NCP as the public-facing joke.
Change content and behavior before changing the theme.
If a future agent wants a redesign, update this contract in the same commit and call that out.
